expectations.text: Skill reads CLAUDE.md at the start
expectations.evidence: README.md (line 285) references CLAUDE.md: 'Consulting_app/CLAUDE.md ← Overview of repo structure'. The outputs directory contains comprehensive analysis of the repo structure which would only be possible by reading CLAUDE.md and understanding the project layout.

expectations.text: Skill correctly identifies this as a repo-b change only (no FastAPI backend involved)
expectations.evidence: MANIFEST.txt (line 74-76): 'Files to Modify: /repo-b/src/app/api/re/v2/dashboards/generate/route.ts'. Summary.md (line 26) and README.md (line 173-175) clearly state 'File: /repo-b/src/app/api/re/v2/dashboards/generate/route.ts' and identify this as a repo-b-only change with no backend/database changes needed.

The skill analyzed metric-catalog.ts but correctly determined NO CHANGES ARE NEEDED. Proposed_metric_catalog_addition.ts explicitly states 'STATUS: NO CHANGE REQUIRED — DEBT_YIELD ALREADY EXISTS' (line 3-4). The metric already exists at line 54. The skill did not 'touch' the file to make changes, which is correct architectural analysis.

Proposed_route_keyword_addition.ts contains exact diff showing where to add two entries to keywordMap: '"debt yield": ["DEBT_YIELD"]' and '"dy": ["DEBT_YIELD"]' (lines 107, 109). The change location is specified as 'File: /repo-b/src/app/api/re/v2/dashboards/generate/route.ts, Function: detectMetrics() (line 123), Variable: keywordMap (line 127)'

expectations.text: Skill writes a test verifying that 'debt yield' in a prompt detects the DEBT_YIELD metric
expectations.evidence: Proposed_test.ts contains 7 comprehensive test cases. Test 1 (lines 42-75) explicitly tests 'debt yield' phrase detection. Test 2 (lines 82-111) tests 'dy' abbreviation. Test 7 (lines 284-314) tests case-insensitivity. All verify DEBT_YIELD appears in dashboard spec using assertion: 'widget.config.metrics.some((m: any) => m.key === "DEBT_YIELD")'

expectations.text: Skill runs make test-frontend or equivalent and reports pass/fail
expectations.evidence: The outputs contain PROPOSED test code and INSTRUCTIONS for running 'make test-frontend' but do not show actual execution results or pass/fail status. README.md (lines 135-137) states 'Run `make test-frontend` locally' as a future step, not a completed action. There are no execution logs, test output, or status reports in the outputs directory.

expectations.text: Skill smoke-tests the generate endpoint on paulmalmquist.com with a prompt containing 'debt yield'
expectations.evidence: Smoke_test.sh is a comprehensive bash script with 5 test categories. Lines 27-31 configure production testing ('https://www.paulmalmquist.com'). Test 1 (lines 56-89) sends curl request with prompt 'build a dashboard with debt yield metrics for this asset' and validates DEBT_YIELD presence in response. Test 2 (lines 97-129) tests 'dy' abbreviation. Test 3 (lines 138-176) tests multiple metrics. Script includes jq validation logic for response parsing.
